EmailTemplate.name: paymentDirectDebitReminder2_EN
EmailTemplate.subject: Final Reminder: Direct Debit Authorisation Required – {!Payment__c.Name}
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Dear {!Contact.FirstName},
This is a final reminder that your direct debit authorisation is still outstanding.
Without this authorisation, we are unable to process your payments and your account may be referred to our support team.
Please complete the setup immediately via the link below:
{!Payment__c.Setup_URL__c}
If you have questions or need assistance, please contact us promptly.
Kind regards, {!Payment__c.Administration__r.Subscription25__Billing_Name__c}
